title: Braised French Tomatoes
description: A classic French dish featuring tender tomatoes slow-cooked in a rich sauce. This recipe is perfect for a cozy dinner.

ingredients.name: midnight
ingredients.notes: midnight oil is not a standard ingredient, but in this case, it's assumed to be olive oil

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: assuming this is the missing ingredient

ingredients.name: croatian
ingredients.notes: assuming this is the missing ingredient, possibly referring to thyme

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Braise the tomatoes, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until they're tender.
Serve the braised tomatoes hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
